name: Ixni-Pec - Yucatan Habanero Sauce - Rhp
recipeIngredient: 1/4 large ripe tomato; peeled and seeded, then chopped
recipeInstructions:
or substitute a mixture of 1 part orange juice to 2 parts fresh lime juice.
Combine all the ingredients in a bowl, seasoning with salt. Serve whenever a chili sauce is called for.
Andrews says this Ixni-Pec is pronounced schnee-pec. This dish is from Yucatan, Mexico.
